front: Meu computador atual tem vinte e quatro gigabytes de memória RAM.
pronunciation: mew kohm-poo-tah-DOHR ah-too-AW cheyng VEENG-chee ee KWAH-troo zhee-gah-BYE-chees jee meh-MOH-ryah hamyng.
back: My current computer has twenty-four gigabytes of RAM.
context: Stating hardware specs using the structural phrase 'memória RAM'.

front: Este modelo vem com um processador de última geração.
pronunciation: EHS-chee moo-DEH-loo vayyng koong oong proo-seh-sah-DOHR jee OOW-chee-mah zheh-rah-SOHNG.
back: This model comes with a latest-generation processor.
context: Describing performance components using 'processador de última geração'.

front: O sistema operacional parou de responder de repente.
pronunciation: oo sees-TEH-mah oo-peh-rah-syo-NAW pah-ROY jee hehs-pohn-DEHR jee heh-PEHN-chee.
back: The operating system stopped responding all of a sudden.
context: Reporting a system crash or freeze using 'sistema operacional'.

front: Você prefere usar o sistema em modo claro ou escuro?
pronunciation: voh-SEH preh-FEH-ree oo-ZAHR oo sees-TEH-mah ahyng MOH-doo KLAH-roo ow ees-KOO-roo?
back: Do you prefer to use the system in light or dark mode?
context: Querying UI display setting configurations ('modo claro' vs. 'modo escuro').

front: Eu preciso instalar as novas atualizações de segurança.
pronunciation: ew prah-SEE-zoo eeyns-tah-LAHR ahs NOH-vahs ah-too-ah-lee-zah-SOHNGS jee seh-goo-RAHN-sah.
back: I need to install the new security updates.
context: Maintaining system integrity using 'atualizações de segurança'.

front: A bateria deste notebook costuma durar o dia todo.
pronunciation: ah bah-teh-REE-ah DEHS-chee notebook koos-TOO-mah doo-RAHR oo JEE-ah TOH-doo.
back: This notebook's battery usually lasts all day.
context: Evaluating hardware durability. Note that 'notebook' is the standard word for laptop in Brazil.

front: Onde posso fazer o download da versão mais recente?
pronunciation: OHN-jee POH-soo fah-ZEHR oo download dah vehr-SOHNG mays heh-SEHN-chee?
back: Where can I download the most recent version?
context: Using the common expression 'fazer o download' alongside version parameters.

front: Minha conexão com a internet está oscilando muito hoje.
pronunciation: MEENG-yah kohn-ehk-SOHNG koong ah een-tehr-NEH-chee ees-TAH oo-see-LAHN-doo MOOI-too OH-zhee.
back: My internet connection is fluctuating a lot today.
context: Describing network instability using the crisp verb 'oscilar'.

front: O aplicativo fechou sozinho enquanto eu salvava o arquivo.
pronunciation: oo ah-plee-kah-CHEE-voo feh-SHOY soo-ZEENG-yoo een-KWAHN-too ew saw-VAH-vah oo ahr-KEE-voo.
back: The app closed by itself while I was saving the file.
context: Describing an application crash loop using 'fechou sozinho'.

front: Vale a pena comprar um monitor com tela maior?
pronunciation: VAH-lee ah PEH-nah kohm-PRAHR oong moo-nee-TOHR koong TEH-lah mah-YOHR?
back: Is it worth it to buy a monitor with a larger screen?
context: Evaluating setup expansion choices using 'tela' (screen/display).

front: Eu mudei o idioma padrão para o inglês.
pronunciation: ew moo-DAY oo ee-jee-OH-mah pah-DROHNG PAH-rah oo eeyng-GLEHS.
back: I changed the default language to English.
context: Configuring UI locale settings using the phrase 'idioma padrão'.

front: Onde ficam armazenados os arquivos de configuração?
pronunciation: OHN-jee FEE-kahyng ahr-mah-zeh-NAH-doos ooz ahr-KEE-voos jee kohn-fee-goo-rah-SOHNG?
back: Where are the configuration files stored?
context: Locating environment profiles using 'arquivos de configuração'.

front: Este periférico é compatível com o meu sistema?
pronunciation: EHS-chee peh-ree-FEH-ree-koo eh kohm-pah-CHEE-vew koong oo mew sees-TEH-mah?
back: Is this peripheral compatible with my system?
context: Checking physical hardware link logic using 'compatível'.

front: O HD externo serve para fazer cópias de segurança.
pronunciation: oo ah-ghee ehks-TEHR-noo SEHR-vee PAH-rah fah-ZEHR KOH-pyahs jee seh-goo-RAHN-sah.
back: The external hard drive is used to make backups.
context: Using the specific formal noun phrase 'cópia de segurança' for a backup.

front: Eu prefiro usar fones de ouvido com cancelamento de ruído.
pronunciation: ew preh-FEE-roo oo-ZAHR FOH-nees jee oo-VEE-doo koong kahn-seh-lah-MEHN-too jee hoo-EE-doo.
back: I prefer to use headphones with noise cancellation.
context: Specifying setup gear layouts via 'cancelamento de ruído'.

front: É preciso reiniciar o roteador para aplicar as mudanças.
pronunciation: eh prah-SEE-zoo hay-nee-sy-AHR oo hoo-teh-ah-DOHR PAH-rah ah-plee-KAHR ahs moo-DAHN-sahs.
back: It is necessary to restart the router to apply the changes.
context: Network infrastructure troubleshooting using 'reiniciar o roteador'.

front: Eu uso uma extensão no navegador para bloquear anúncios.
pronunciation: ew OO-zoo OO-mah eyks-tehn-SOHNG noo nah-veh-gah-DOHR PAH-rah bloo-ky-AHR ah-NOONG-syoos.
back: I use a browser extension to block ads.
context: Discussing browser tweaks using 'navegador' (browser) and 'extensão' (extension).

front: Esse erro costuma acontecer quando o servidor cai.
pronunciation: EHS-ee EH-hoo koos-TOO-mah ah-kohn-teh-SEHR KWAHN-doo oo sehr-vee-DOHR ky.
back: This error usually happens when the server goes down.
context: Diagnosing failure loops using the idiomatic verb phrase 'o servidor cai'.

front: Não se esqueça de salvar o projeto antes de fechar.
pronunciation: nohng see ehs-KEH-sah jee saw-VAHR oo proo-ZHEH-too AHN-chees jee feh-SHAHR.
back: Don't forget to save the project before closing.
context: A standard warning loop reminder using negative imperative 'não se esqueça de'.

front: O armazenamento em nuvem ajuda a economizar espaço.
pronunciation: oo ahr-mah-zeh-nah-MEHN-too ahyng NOO-vehyng ah-ZHOO-dah ah ee-koh-noo-mee-ZAHR ees-PAH-soo.
back: Cloud storage helps save space.
context: Describing decentralized architecture using 'armazenamento em nuvem'.

front: Você pode alterar a resolução da tela nas configurações.
pronunciation: voh-SEH POH-jee aw-teh-RAHR ah heh-zoo-loo-SOHNG dah TEH-lah nahs kohn-fee-goo-rah-SOHNGS.
back: You can change the screen resolution in the settings.
context: Guiding a user through display tweaks using 'resolução da tela'.

front: Eu configurei a autenticação em duas etapas por segurança.
pronunciation: ew kohn-fee-goo-RAY ah ow-tehny-chee-kah-SOHNG ahyng DOO-ahs eh-TAH-pahs poor seh-goo-RAHN-sah.
back: I set up two-factor authentication for security.
context: Discussing account protection protocols via 'autenticação em duas etapas'.

front: O mouse com fio é mais confiável para jogos.
pronunciation: oo MOW-zee koong FEE-oo eh mays kohn-FY-ah-vew PAH-rah ZHOH-goos.
back: The wired mouse is more reliable for gaming.
context: Contrasting device wiring links using 'com fio' (wired) as opposed to wireless.

front: Este software consome muitos recursos do sistema.
pronunciation: EHS-chee software kohn-SOH-mee MOOI-toos heh-KOOR-soos doo sees-TEH-mah.
back: This software consumes a lot of system resources.
context: Identifying processing overhead bloat using 'consome recursos'.

front: Minha placa de vídeo antiga não roda esse jogo.
pronunciation: MEENG-yah PLAH-kah jee VEE-jee-oo ahn-CHEE-gah nohng HOH-dah EHS-ee ZHOH-goo.
back: My old graphics card doesn't run this game.
context: Discussing processing bottlenecks via 'placa de vídeo' (GPU/graphics card).

front: O link de ativação foi enviado para o seu e-mail.
pronunciation: oo leeyng-kee jee ah-chee-vah-SOHNG foy eehn-vy-AH-doo PAH-rah oo seu e-mail.
back: The activation link was sent to your email.
context: Standard account onboarding verification script phrase.

front: A velocidade de upload é importante para fazer streaming.
pronunciation: ah veh-loo-see-DAH-jee jee upload eh eeym-pohr-TAHN-chee PAH-rah fah-ZEHR streaming.
back: Upload speed is important for streaming.
context: Discussing bandwidth profiles using 'velocidade de upload'.

front: Eu prefiro usar um teclado mecânico para digitar.
pronunciation: ew preh-FEE-roo oo-ZAHR oong cheh-KLAH-doo meh-KAH-nee-koo PAH-rah jee-zhee-TAHR.
back: I prefer to use a mechanical keyboard to type.
context: Discussing tactile feedback hardware ergonomics using 'teclado mecânico'.

front: O suporte técnico resolveu o problema em uma hora.
pronunciation: oo soo-POHR-chee TEHK-nee-koo heh-zowl-VEW oo proo-BLEH-ma ahyng OO-mah OH-rah.
back: Technical support solved the problem in one hour.
context: Crediting help desk remediation timelines via 'suporte técnico'.

front: Essa ferramenta ajuda a automatizar tarefas repetitivas.
pronunciation: EHS-ah feh-hah-MEHN-tah ah-ZHOO-dah ah ow-too-mah-chee-ZAHR tah-REH-fahs heh-peh-chee-TEE-vahs.
back: This tool helps to automate repetitive tasks.
context: Stating utility value using 'automatizar tarefas'.

front: É arriscado clicar em links de remetentes desconhecidos.
pronunciation: eh ah-ees-KAH-doo klee-KAHR ahyng leeyng-kees jee heh-meh-TEHN-chees dees-koon-ye-SEE-doos.
back: It is risky to click on links from unknown senders.
context: Phishing or cyber security risk education using 'remetentes desconhecidos'.

front: Você saberia me dizer como limpar o cache do navegador?
pronunciation: voh-SEH sah-beh-REE-ah mee jee-ZEHR KOH-moo leeym-PAHR oo cache doo nah-veh-gah-DOHR?
back: Would you know how to tell me how to clear the browser cache?
context: A conditional-polite troubleshooting query using 'limpar o cache'.

front: O instalador do programa está corrompido.
pronunciation: oo eeyns-tah-lah-DOHR doo proo-GRAH-mah ees-TAH koh-hoohm-PEE-doo.
back: The program installer is corrupted.
context: Reporting a broken file package binary error using 'corrompido'.

front: Meu notebook antigo esquentava demais por falta de limpeza.
pronunciation: mew notebook ahn-CHEE-gah ees-keehn-TAH-vah jee-MAYS poor FAWL-tah jee leeym-PEH-zah.
back: My old notebook used to overheat too much due to a lack of cleaning.
context: Explaining thermal throttling tracking states using the imperfect tense 'esquentava'.

front: A nova atualização corrigiu vários bugs de desempenho.
pronunciation: ah NOH-vah ah-too-ah-lee-zah-SOHNG koh-hee-ZHEEW VAH-ryoos bugs jee dehs-eeymp-AY-nyoo.
back: The new update fixed several performance bugs.
context: Reviewing system patch notes using the past action 'corrigiu' (corrected/fixed).
